strategy: He is stunable and beguilable, so a stun buys safe setup rounds.
His only cheat occasionally sets a Death Equalize capping your damage at 500, so a single giant hit can get wasted. If the cap is up, plan several 500 hits; if it is not, burst normally.
Watch the Global before committing your big hit. If the 500 cap is active, replace it with your own Global or grind him down in 500-damage chunks.
No resist is listed, so attack with your strongest school; Life boosts against his Death side.
Stack blades and a Feint, then hit when the cap is down.
cheatNotes: He occasionally drops a Death Equalize capping all damage at 500. Check the Global before your kill shot; if it is up, overwrite it or hit in 500-damage chunks.
